bg-base.$description: Obsidian — Page canvas, never pure black. The deep matte base every surface sits on.

bg-surface.$description: Titanium — Elevated panels and structural containers, used sparingly.

text-main.$description: High-Def White — Primary text, headings, nav labels, button text on dark fills.

text-muted.$description: Slate Muted — Secondary text, micro-labels at rest, timestamps, helper copy.

hairline.$description: Hairline Chrome — 1px rules that replace card chrome, the primary structural device.

accent-services.$description: Electric Blue — Services vertical + hub interactive states. A signal, never wallpaper.

accent-shakes.$description: Copper — Shakes vertical. Reads as a brushed-metal material in 3D.

accent-shakes-light.$description: Copper Light — Highlights, hover states, gradient tops on metallic surfaces.

accent-solutions.$description: Neon Yellow — Solutions/Night Games vertical. Signal only — CTAs, active states, print mark.

accent-mn.$description: Forest Green (reference only) — M&N Collective's own accent, referenced so the hub can render its panel correctly. Never used inside a Saturday-branded surface.

space-grotesk.$description: Display + headings typeface. Sharp geometric neo-grotesque. H1/H2 uppercase, 0.12-0.15em tracking. Substitute: Archivo, General Sans.

elms-sans.$description: UI, navigation, and micro-label typeface. Utilitarian geometric instrument voice, uppercase 10-13px labels. Substitute: Archivo Expanded, IBM Plex Sans.

inter.$description: Body reading typeface. Neutral, highly legible workhorse, 14-16px at 150%+ leading. Substitute: system-ui.

instrument-serif.$description: Editorial flourish typeface, italic. Reserved for exactly one moment per viewport. Substitute: Georgia italic.

label.$description: Nav labels, form labels, table headers

editorial.$description: Editorial flourish — tagline, pull-quote. One per viewport maximum.

chamfer-compact.$description: 45-degree corner cut size for compact panels (applied via clip-path, not radius)

chamfer-hero.$description: 45-degree corner cut size for hero-scale panels (applied via clip-path, not radius)

void.$description: Surface level 0: full-bleed page canvas, hero background

titanium-panel.$description: Surface level 1: elevated cards and structural containers, used sparingly

glass-overlay.$description: Surface level 2: modals, popovers, toasts — the only surface permitted glassmorphism (blur 12px + hairline)
